import pytest


@pytest.fixture
def api_key():
    return "sk-proj-abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345pqr678stu901vwx234"


@pytest.fixture
def jwt_secret():
    return "my-super-secret-jwt-signing-key-2024-production"


@pytest.fixture
def db_credentials():
    return {
        "username": "admin",
        "password": "P@ssw0rd!2024#Secure",
        "host": "db.production.internal",
    }


@pytest.fixture
def private_key():
    return """-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIEpAIBAAKCAQEA0Z3VS5JJcds3xfn/ygWyF8PbnGy0AHB7MhgHcTz6sE2I2yPB
aFDrBz9vFqU5yTfMJPHE2TkDBAUZIcJqWZ9v2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2Ik2I
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----"""
